Off Calendar May-07-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS RITA SCHUMAN, ANDREW SCHUMAN, STEPHANIE SCHUMAN'S MOTION TO RESTORE CASE TO CIVIL ACTIVE LIST

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to restore this case to active status is granted. The stay is hereby lifted. Proposed order submitted for review. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
